title: Weak Password Policy Leads to Credential Theft
description: The system lacks information about password complexity requirements or enforcement. This allows an attacker to create weak passwords, potentially leading to successful credential theft through brute-force or dictionary attacks.  Without multi-factor authentication, compromised credentials provide immediate access.
attack_vector: Brute-force attack, credential stuffing, dictionary attack targeting username/password combination.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (minimum length, character requirements, regular password changes).
Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.
Utilize rate limiting and account lockout mechanisms to mitigate brute-force attacks.
